stemHtml: Radar has many uses in civil aviation. For which tasks are primary and secondary radar used?

options.a: For ATC to provide tracking of aircraft and manage traffic within a given airspace.
options.b: For the pilot to navigate and avoid areas of significant weather.
options.c: For ATC to reduce the workload of the pilot by taking over the task of navigating.
options.d: For the pilot to detect other aircraft and reduce the risk of collision.
